creator: achilov-rn@askd.ru
text:
On Wednesday 27 December 2006 12:45, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of net/smb4k,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/107225 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/107225

This is my patch :-) Because corporate mail is slightly tangled, as usually I 
have submitted from wrong email :-) Please change maintainer email in port 
from achilov-rn@askd.ru to shelton@master.askd.ru to correct this in future
-- 
   With Best Regards.
